---
title: Dmitri Brackenbury
type: person

summary: Founder of Windrose.

Dmitri Brackenbury is the founder of Windrose. Dmitri shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Windrose
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Dmitri Brackenbury.
---

Windrose is a seed-stage company. Founded by Dmitri Brackenbury. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Windrose call with Dmitri Brackenbury.
Dmitri prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
I committed to sending Dmitri the diligence checklist by Friday.
Dmitri said Windrose hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
